programmes.show_description: Sparks fly between recently widowed Rebecca and ranch hand Jake, who works at the property she goes to on holiday. But is Jake's availability a worrying factor in their relationship? (2024)
40-year-old book editor Juniper is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories. (2024)

After rescuing a hive, beekeeper Eva is thrown into a bumbling quest across Malta with Austen, an archaeologist. Buzzing romcom. (2024)
When a psychic tells Charlotte she is destined to marry her best friend, Rory, only one thing stands in her way... his fiancée. (2023)
After training in Paris, a perfumer swaps the capital of France for her small home town in the US, where she rents a shop front for her new perfumery from a handsome businessman. (2022)
As the Easter holiday approaches, a woman rediscovers a blessing bracelet that helps restore her faith and renew her belief in love. (2023)
After missing out on a promotion, Monica walks the Camino de Santiago. She's surprised when she finds inner peace and a potential romance. (2025)
Contest winners try to solve a fake murder for a grand prize, but the event goes awry when a real murder occurs and secrets are uncovered. Cozy crime thriller. (2025)
After suffering a series of setbacks, a professional golfer returns home to Budapest to reflect on her future in the sport. There, she meets a man who helps her rediscover herself. (2024)
Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up. (2026)
A mutual love of Jane Austen's stories causes an overly serious scholar and an actor playing Mr Darcy to fall head over heels into their own fairy tale romance. (2024)
When Tamara visits her family's apple orchard, she reconnects with her childhood best friend and together they fight - armed with pastry and passion - to keep the orchard alive. (2022)
Poppy and Milo are getting engaged, but only so that she can advance her career and he can move into a penthouse. It's purely transactional. Or is it? (2022)

Theme Park performer Lacey becomes friends with eight-year-old princess Rose and is swept up in the royal world of luxury and nobility. Nichole Sakura stars. (2025)
The wedding between ghost hunters Jane and Brian at a haunted inn is disrupted by Angelique - a ghost who mistakes Brian for her own dead fiancé. (2024)
After making the return to the office on a hybrid schedule, two co-workers spark up an office romance after sending flirty notes to each other. (2025)
Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up. (2026)
Surprises are in store for Ilana when she travels to Santorini with her Greek boyfriend Mike for a family wedding. (2023)
Struggling to save her farm, a woman enters a floral design contest, where she develops a blossoming romance with a local pastor. (2023)
Sparks fly between recently widowed Rebecca and ranch hand Jake, who works at the property she goes to on holiday. But is Jake's availability a worrying factor in their relationship? (2024)
A single mum agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a competition but misunderstands and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. (2025)
Busy events planner Emma doesn't have time for love, but could the charming best man at her sister's wedding convince her to give romance - and him - a second chance? (2022)
